title: useInterval
description: Sets up a recurring interval with the provided callback and delay, with automatic cleanup.
summary: Runs a function repeatedly with a specified delay.

`,(0,t.jsx)(r,{name:"use-interval",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function useInterval(fn: () => void, interval: number) {\r
  const [active, setActive] = useState(false);\r
  const intervalRef = useRef<number | undefined>(undefined);\r
  const fnRef = useRef<() => void>(() => {});\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    fnRef.current = fn;\r
  }, [fn]);\r
\r
  const start = () => {\r
    setActive(old => {\r
      if (!old && !intervalRef.current) {\r
        intervalRef.current = window.setInterval(fnRef.current!, interval);\r
      }\r
      return true;\r
    });\r
  };\r
\r
  const stop = () => {\r
    setActive(false);\r
    window.clearInterval(intervalRef.current);\r
    intervalRef.current = undefined;\r
  };\r
\r
  const toggle = () => {\r
    if (active) {\r
      stop();\r
    } else {\r
      start();\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  return { start, stop, toggle, active };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-interval.ts"})]})}function d(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,t.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,t.jsx)(u,{...n})}):u(n)}function y(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return R(b);})();
